## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on blog strategy implementation and discuss final details before article publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog section in Webflow is ready for content upload; 10 articles ready to go live, 10 more this week](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Agreed on blog categories: branding, web design, motion design, digital advertising, marketing design, and illustration](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [NBD team approves GrowthX to publish articles directly without additional review](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [URL structure confirmed as /blog/article-slug; category pages may be considered later for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)

## Topics

### Content Progress and Brand Guidelines

  - [10 articles ready for publication, 10 more to be completed this week](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Brand guidelines and voice guidance implemented into GrowthX's workflow](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Figma designs and Loom video for blog section reviewed and understood](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

### Blog Categories and Filtering

  - [Categories based on NBD's service clusters: branding, web design, motion design, digital advertising, marketing design, and illustration](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Potential SEO value in keeping categories separate, can be adapted over time](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Future consideration for "client success" category as content strategy expands](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

### Blog Design and Image Strategy

  - [Main blog page design finalized, mobile version reviewed](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [25-30 images per category bucket planned for variety without obvious repetition](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Decision to keep images without text overlay to avoid visual clutter](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)

### Content Upload and Publishing Process

  - [GrowthX team authorized to upload and publish articles directly](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Articles can be saved as drafts or published under any category](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Category adjustments can be made later without affecting URL structure](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)

### URL Structure and SEO Considerations

  - [Agreed on simple URL structure: /blog/article-slug](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
  - [Discussion on potential benefits of category-specific URLs (e.g., /blog/category/category-name)](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Emphasis on keeping URLs short and simple for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Additional Strategic Insights

  - [NBD provided notes on migration pain points (WordPress to Webflow, HubSpot to Webflow)](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Reminder that web development topics should focus exclusively on Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)

## Next Steps

  - [NBD to confirm timeline for making blog categories live in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin uploading articles, potentially publishing them directly](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [NBD team to provide visuals for blog posts soon](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [Both teams to monitor progress and results of initial article publications](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
  - [GrowthX to refer to NBD's notes on migration topics for future content](https://fathom.video/share/LPjY7S1pntxLa_W4sypxTZ2_rWSc1iKk?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
